text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Spring Fan Fest, where
fans of racing are invited to the academy to enjoy
various events and entertainment by the
Umamusume they support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the Solefall Faire in fall, the Spring Fan
Fest is known to have more athletic events. As
such, the event Admire Vega is participating in
is...

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member A
text_block_list.text:
The Tug-of-the-Ages is about to begin on the
academy grounds!

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member B
text_block_list.text:
Seats are filling up quick! So those who want to
watch better hurry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, welcome! The Tug-of-the-Ages
showdown is ready to begin!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All you excited fans out there! Let! Me! Hear!
You! SCREEEAM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think that's enough, El? You're one of
the participants, so how about handing the mic to
the actual commentator?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hold ooon! Hypin' the crowd up is an important
responsibility! And I don't think they're loud
enough yet!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right! I'm joking! I'll put the mic down
and head over!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're finally back! I can't believe you
skipped our strategy meeting!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, there's no need to be upset. What do
we need a strategy meeting for anyway? All this
takes is moving in sync, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, all the other meetings have pretty much
been about choosing our team name.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What were you guys arguing about again? You
wanted the name First-Rate Super Five, and El
preferred Amiga Soul...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, we decided to draw lots and chose
Sparkling Go-Getters!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Sei, King, El, and Grass! Let's go for the
win!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! The Golden Generation is all here!
They've been tearing it up in the Twinkle Series!
This is gonna be crazy! I said craaazy!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I'm all in on them! I saw on Umatter they've been
moving perfectly in sync during practices.

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Um... What about their opponents?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Alea iacta est!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to engage the enemy, team?
Follow me, Overlord's Quintet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm right behind you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, Doto, Urara, and Ayabe! Let's work
together to beat the Golden Generation!

text_block_list.name: Doto and Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeah!
Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I've been training how to tug like
a pro! Ehehe, pulling your tail really hurts though!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It's important not to fall down, but if you do,
don't let go... You can still serve as a weight!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Get in place, everyone. It's starting soon.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oooh? The opposing team gives a strong
impression, but they seem to be a bit
uncoordinated, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Well, we'll just have to see what happens. Look,
it's starting!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Let's get this Tug-of-the-Ages started! Our first
battle is between the Sparkling Go-Getters and
the Overlord's Quintet!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Whoever gets the best of three rounds wins! All
right? Let's start round one!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Everyone together! Heave, hooo!

text_block_list.name: Sparkling Go-Getters
text_block_list.text: Heave, hooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, incredible! As expected, the Golden
Generation is perfectly in sync!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Raaagh! Hmph... Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Overlord's Quintet
text_block_list.text: Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Overlord's Quintet has completely
collapsed! The first round goes to the Sparkling
Go-Getters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gritting her teeth and digging her feet into the
ground, T.M. Opera O earnestly fought for the
win. But she regretfully must concede the first
round!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh nooo! We lost! Spe and her friends are real
tough!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, they're moving in perfect unison. Each time
they cry out, the rope becomes immovable!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
We also practiced chanting in unison, but they
didn't give us a chance to even let out one cry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I think we need to at least try and
synchronize our movements better!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why just do the same thing they're doing?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
They're all in the same year, while our team is
mixed. That makes them more used to working
together.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We could do our best to synchronize, but I doubt
it'll be enough to beat the Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh... Y-yeah... you may be right...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But... we can still strategize. There has to be
something only we can pull off.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm?! What is it, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you're all worked up because of who our
opponents are.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But while you're all hung up on your Overlord act,
I think you're forgetting the "quintet" part of our
team's name.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're the one always talking about operas. And
you're the one always dragging us into your act.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's always been that way. So hurry up and get this
performance started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The second round begins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! A towering golden wave swells in the
horizon! It surges forward as the undertow pulls
you in, ready to crush you into pieces! But will it
stand in our way of victory?! (La laa! ♪)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No! La, la la laa!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, hark! We shall not lose! We shall not waver!
The reason being! (The reason being!)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Haha, the reason being!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Because I am I! Because we are we!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: The Overlord's Quintet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Quinteeet... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak! Thoosh, thoosh, thoosh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! What're they singin' for? That supposed to
make 'em stronger or something?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable... the Overlord's Quintet won!
They're like a completely different team from the
first round. Um, that was some unique teamwork!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That was so weird, wasn't it?! What the heck was
that... a song?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The match could go either way at this point!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, we lost! Ohhhh... I really wanted to win
with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We got really close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regrettably, they failed to secure a victory in the
third round, facing a narrow defeat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, with Admire Vega having the chance to
express her support for her peers, I feel it turned
into a pretty good day.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, I wanna sing with you again! Your singing
voice is soooo beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Uuh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You could hear me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha! ☆ Undisputed victory! ☆

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As disciples of the stars who received whispers of
the sages, let us embrace, full of gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How about let's not...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Haha! But you and Opera O have such good
chemistry!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Actually, I've been thinking that for a while now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You have a very theatrical air about you. Like,
the way you speak sounds a bit like storytelling a
lot of the time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What does she mean by "the way I speak"?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Actually... I don't want to know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Um, Ayabe? We should probably turn the lights
out soon.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, do you think...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, the Fan Fest turned out to be a big
success!
